title: aira pulchra
intro: Aira pulchra, also known as purple oat grass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Aira pulchra include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
